M0840_ECR_INJURY (M0840) Injury Caused by Fall/Accident Emergent Care Reason: injury caused by fall or accident at home. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, Space = Unknown. CHAR 1 x x
M0840_ECR_NAUSEA (M0840) Nausea/Dehydration/Malnutrition/Constipation/Impaction Emergent Care Reason: nausea, dehydration, malnutrition, constipation, impaction. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, Space = Unknown. CHAR 1 x x
M0840_ECR_OTHER (M0840) Other than Above Reasons for Emergent Care Emergent Care Reason: other than
